import React from 'react'; import { Star } from 'lucide-react'; import { testimonials } from '../data/mockData'; export const Testimonials = () => { return (
{/* Section Header */}
Testimonios

{testimonials.map((testimonial) => (

{[...Array(testimonial.rating)].map((_, i) => ( ))}
